# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source is a serious preprint with real experimental results across multiple benchmarks.

## Why

The excerpt shows a formal research manuscript on arXiv with a controlled study spanning 180 configurations, multiple agent architectures, multiple LLM families, four named benchmarks, and concrete quantitative results including effect sizes, relative performance changes, error amplification rates, predictive accuracy, and cross-validated R². That is clear empirical substance, not commentary or theorycrafting.

## Limits
